key.name: toggle-shortcut
key.description: Shortcut to open and close Superbar.

key.name: clipboard-monitor-enabled
key.description: Continuously monitor the clipboard to build history.

key.name: clipboard-history-limit
key.description: Maximum number of clipboard entries to remember.

key.name: max-results
key.description: How many results to show in the search bar at once.

key.name: bar-width
key.description: Width of the Superbar in pixels.

key.name: bar-position
key.description: Vertical position of the Superbar: top, center, or bottom.
